_comment: RDMA Image Pipeline — Node 0 (loader / sender).  Run on machine 0.
_comment2: Node 0 loads 3 PPM images into I/O slot 10, then runs a 1-stage StreamPipeline
_comment3: that decodes each image (img_load_ppm) into stream slot 20 and sends it to node 1
_comment4: via RDMA after each round.  free_after=true clears slot 20 between rounds.

nodes._comment: ─── Pre-load all 3 binary PPMs into I/O slot 10 (one record per image) ──────
─── 3-round StreamPipeline: decode one PPM per round → stream slot 20 ───────
nodes._comment2: img_load_ppm reads the next record from I/O slot 10 each round (cursor-based),
nodes._comment3: writes decoded pixel data to stream slot 20, then RDMA-sends slot 20 to node 1.
nodes._comment4: free_after=true resets slot 20 after each send so the next round starts fresh.
